description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Macareux Hylopites pasta, featuring a modern, minimalist design with a white background and blue accent panels. The front of the box displays a cut-out window in the shape of a stylized heart, revealing the yellow, flat pasta strips inside. The front panel includes the brand name 'MACAREUX' and the product name 'HYLOPITES With Eggs & Milk' along with weight and ingredient details. The sides and back of the box provide nutritional information, cooking instructions, and a barcode, all printed on blue and black panels. The box is sealed and appears sturdy, suitable for retail display or storage. The overall appearance is clean, with clear branding and product visibility through the window.
description: A rectangular white and blue cardboard box of Macareux Hylopites pasta with a heart-shaped window showing the pasta inside. The packaging features modern graphics, branding, and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Macareux branding, product name, and a heart-shaped window displaying the pasta inside.
description_view_1: Side view with a blue panel containing nutritional information and a barcode.
description_view_2: Back view with additional product and company information, including a QR code and more blue accenting.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with cooking instructions in multiple languages and a bold black graphic.
attribute_labeling: Front: MACAREUX logo, product name, ingredients, weight; Sides: nutritional information, barcode, cooking instructions, graphics; Back: company info, QR code.
